text.message: danoooo, i think our picks last game took longer than the game itself

the bot picked the spots for me
ah true, you were botted the first half
thats why you solo blocked me earlier haha

i mean yeah 3 for 1 but its safe for the one up top
i respect the playing ahead idea lol
but just ask next time lol
im not a hater but i disagree with the game plan here

i havent had a chance to use them
why would i use my knigh twhen i know they will
to fight army.. thats your win condition..
not when im already two turns behind
mate.. i am on 7 i'll admit i have 1 vp... black is on 9..
